---
title: SharedSvelteCounter
format: html
filters:
  - quarto-svelte
quarto-svelte:
  use:
    - ../components/ComponentA.svelte
    - ../components/ComponentB.svelte
---

> Share via window.__shared_counter__;

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
myCompA = html`<my-componenta></my-componenta>`
myCompB = html`<my-componentb></my-componentb>`
```
